chunks.text: 1 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Ist Appeal No.111 of 2015 Dated Order with signature of Judge Hearing case (priority) 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No. 6097/2015 (stay) Dated 26.02.2024 None present for the Appellant Mr. Zahid Hussain Advocate for the Respondent No.1.-.-.-.-.-. Since last two dates the Appellant is not attending the matter and today is third date of hearing. This appeal is pending since 2015 and the Appellant is not appearing in this matter for a quite some time, which reflects that the Appellant has lost his interest to pursue this appeal. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
